title: Senior Teacher - Simplilearn South Asia Partners - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Simplilearn South Asia Partners - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Teacher looking for your next big career move? Simplilearn South Asia Partners in Bhopal offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Simplilearn South Asia Partners:
Simplilearn South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Simplilearn South Asia Partners!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
